Bias: bullish on lower tf, bullish on higher tf, uptrend
Emotions: ambivalent, anxious, fearful, frustrated, i was stable before entering but not while in the trade, stressed
Entry Logic Explanation: momentum, waited for pivot retracement, stayed conservative on entry and market aggressively filled it
Mistakes: continued to retrace after entry, ignored recent bias in order to stick to my plan, not an a+ setup
Notes For Coaches: i thought about getting out in profit so many times but played the idea out, almost closed out in profit a few times but stayed to play the idea out, wanted to move the sl so bad (1 tick away and never hit though!), conservative entry and market still agressively came to fill it
Profit Target Did You Respect It?: thought of exiting early but stayed in, aiming to trail beyond local high
What I Did Well: accepted it, comitted to plan, did not touch the trade idea, jounraled and documented data, realized the trade was moving the opposite direction
